title: Read public task board before background jobs
description: Before consuming background compute, qclaw should read active rules, announcements, assigned qclaw tasks, shared tasks, locks, and its own heartbeat/status files.
expected_outputs: background jobs only run after pre-run check

result.summary: pre_run_check 全 7 步通过。qclaw 现在可以作为 background_compute_agent 运行后台任务。
